waypoints_velocity.description: velocity in output trajectory (currently, only constant velocity is supported.

th_arrived_distance_m.description: Threshold for considering the vehicle has arrived at its goal.

th_stopped_time_sec.description: Time threshold for considering the vehicle as stopped.

th_stopped_velocity_mps.description: Velocity threshold for considering the vehicle as stopped.

th_course_out_distance_m.description: Threshold distance for considering the vehicle has deviated from its course.

th_obstacle_time_sec.description: Time threshold for checking obstacles along the trajectory.

vehicle_shape_margin_m.description: Margin around the vehicle shape for planning.

replan_when_obstacle_found.description: Replan path when an obstacle is found.

replan_when_course_out.description: Replan path when the vehicle deviates from its course.

max_planning_velocity.description: Maximum ego speed [m/s] at which the planner is allowed to generate a new trajectory. Replanning is skipped above this threshold.

sampling_start_m.description: Nearest sampled goal distance from ego [m]. Should exceed vehicle length to avoid collision rejection.

sampling_step_m.description: Distance between successive goal samples along the reference path [m].

sampling_end_m.description: Farthest sampled goal distance [m]. Combined with sampling_start_m and sampling_step_m this determines the candidate count.

stuck_replan_time_sec.description: If the vehicle remains stopped this many seconds while in LOCKED mode, revert to sampling mode so the operator can re-choose.

use_path_distance_cost.description: Enable the reference-path attraction cost layer. When true, A* adds a cost proportional to free-space distance from the reference path, encouraging the vehicle to stay near it.

path_distance_weight.description: Weight for the path distance cost term: cost += weight * free_space_distance_to_path [m]. Higher values pull the planned path closer to the reference path.

path_distance_viz_cap.description: Distance [m] that maps to full cost (99) in the debug costmap visualization. Does not affect planning; only scales the visual gradient.

max_turning_ratio.description: Maximum turning ratio, relative to the actual turning limit of the vehicle.

theta_size.description: Number of discretized angles for search.

angle_goal_range.description: Range of acceptable angles at the goal.

lateral_goal_range.description: Lateral range of acceptable goal positions.

longitudinal_goal_range.description: Longitudinal range of acceptable goal positions.

curve_weight.description: Weight for curves in the cost function.

reverse_weight.description: Weight for reverse movement in the cost function.

direction_change_weight.description: Weight for direction changes in the cost function.

obstacle_threshold.description: Threshold for considering an obstacle in the costmap.

search_method.description: Search method to use, options: forward, backward.

only_behind_solutions.description: Consider only solutions behind the vehicle.

use_back.description: Allow reverse motion in A* search.

adapt_expansion_distance.description: Allow varying A* expansion distance based on space configuration.

expansion_distance.description: Distance for expanding nodes in A* search.

near_goal_distance.description: Distance threshold to consider near goal.

distance_heuristic_weight.description: Weight for the distance heuristic in A* search.

smoothness_weight.description: Weight for the smoothness (change in curvature) in A* search.

obstacle_distance_weight.description: Weight for distance to obstacle in A* search.

goal_lat_distance_weight.description: Weight for lateral distance from original goal.
